hero.title: Hi, I'm
hero.p-2: Lover of creating products which make people's life easier.

about.title: About
about.text: I am a junior web developer. I love coding and technology and am excited to build my skills in web development. My training includes modern programming languages and tools that help me create easy-to-use websites. I look forward to improving my skills and taking on new challenges in the future.

education-card-1.place: Web Development Course, DCI (Digital Career Institute), Online

education-card-2.place: Master's in Business Administration (MA), University of Space Engineering, Saint Petersburg

education-card-3.place: Bachelor's in Business Administration (BA), Immanuel Kant University, Kaliningrad

skills.title: My Skills
skills.description: As a motivated junior developer, I have hands-on experience working with core web technologies such as JavaScript, React, Node.js, Tailwind, CSS3, MongoDB, HTML5 and Sass. I am passionate about building responsive, user-friendly web applications and continually improving my coding skills. My focus is on writing clean, maintainable code and learning best practices in modern web development. I am eager to collaborate with experienced teams to contribute to meaningful projects and grow as a developer.

items.name: Gallery
items.description: This is a frontend project built with Vue and Nuxt that showcases an artist’s portfolio, including a gallery, artist information, and contact details.

items.name: Reshare
items.description: This is the final project developed as part of the Web Development course at the Digital Career Institute. It combines frontend and backend using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js) and uses Tailwind CSS for the design, demonstrating the implementation of a full-stack web application with the technologies learned.

items.name: Diary
items.description: This is a full-stack project with React and Node.js. Here, users can register, reset their password, and create, edit, and delete new entries.

items.name: Harry Potter
items.description: This Harry Potter-themed test website allows users to explore characters from the wizarding world. Users can search for characters by name, view their key details, and filter by house. The data is dynamically fetched from the Harry Potter API to provide an interactive experience..

items.name: Human Internal Organs
items.description: An educational site that explores the functions and anatomy of human internal organs, including the brain, lungs, heart, stomach, liver, kidneys, and intestines.

items.name: Photo Gallery
items.description: A personal project website about Iwan Aiwasowski, featuring his biography, a gallery of famous paintings, and a contact form for inquiries.

contact.title: Contact
